OpenAI's GPT 5.6 (Sol, Terra, Luna) is available on Vercel AI Gateway in limited preview at provider pricing with no markup.

Went through 22 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. GPT 5.6 Sol, Luna, and Terra now available on AI Gateway
   Major model generation available through an aggregator with a concrete cost-reduction path for agent workloads.

2. EU AI Act Article 50: machine-readable disclosure for AI content starts August 2026
   A regulatory deadline one month out that most small AI-content shippers appear unaware of.

3. [AINews] OpenAI launches GPT 5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna, Codex becomes ChatGPT superapp
   Companion analysis to the day's main model story, including the distinct Codex-superapp angle.

   New agent-oriented model option with explicit MCP support, relevant to MCP/agent work.

5. Build logs now redact Sensitive Environment Variable values
   Real reduction of a common secrets-exposure risk for anyone deploying on Vercel.
